candidates.name: Entrepreneurship Hub
candidates.desc: This website is the homesite of the Innovation and Entrepreneurship Lab (ieLab), a faculty-driven initiative assisting with the innovation and entrepreneurship teaching and service mission of the university, and a resource hub providing information about entrepreneurship at UC Merced — specifically, information and news about:

candidates.name: Innovation and Entrepreneurship Lab (ieLab)
candidates.desc: The Innovation and Entrepreneurship Lab is a faculty-driven initiative assisting with the innovation and entrepreneurship teaching, service and extension mission of the university. The lab operates under the auspices of the Institute for Research in Innovation, Sustainability and Entrepreneurship (UCMiRISE), the mother institution facilitating the research component related to innovation and entrepreneurship.
candidates.longDescription: The Innovation and Entrepreneurship Lab is a faculty-driven initiative assisting with the innovation and entrepreneurship teaching, service and extension mission of the university. The lab operates under the auspices of the Institute for Research in Innovation, Sustainability and Entrepreneurship (UCMiRISE), the mother institution facilitating the research component related to innovation and entrepreneurship. Click here for the members list. Actvities planned for this year include workshop presentations by affiliated faculty during Innovation and Entrepreneurship Symposium, an annual event org
